chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1472 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.5794/2025 (C/A) 12.01.2026 Mr. Alam Sher Khan Bozdar, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Learned AAG Sindh files a statement enclosing an offer letter dated 06.01.2026 issued to the Petitioner for appointment on the deceased quota in compliance of order dated 25.11.2025. Apparently, the order dated 25.11.2025 was passed for enforcing an earlier order dated 16.04.2024 allowing the petition prior to the case of General Post Office Islamabad v. Muhammad Jalal (PLD 2024 SC 1276). In view of the offer letter, Counsel for the petitioner does not press the listed application further; the same is disposed of accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
